item.title: Silky Smooth Pumpkin Tiramisu
item.description: Pumpkin tiramisu is the silky smooth, requires zero baking and can be made ahead

media:content.media:title: Silky Smooth Pumpkin Tiramisu
media:content.media:description: Pumpkin tiramisu is the silky smooth, requires zero baking and can be made ahead

item.title: This Harvest Salad Just Hits Right
item.description: Tart, sweet, creamy, and savory all in one bowl—exactly the kind of salad worth making again.

media:content.media:title: This Harvest Salad Just Hits Right
media:content.media:description: Tart, sweet, creamy, and savory all in one bowl—exactly the kind of salad worth making again.

item.title: Put On Music, Make This Apple Pie
item.description: A slow, cozy bake that turns a quiet afternoon into something lovely.

media:content.media:description: A slow, cozy bake that turns a quiet afternoon into something lovely.

item.description: This is the best recipe for muffins. Easy and quick

media:content.media:description: This is the best recipe for muffins. Easy and quick

item.title: French Silk Pie
item.description: this pie ticks off all of the boxes 1. you can make it ahead 2. only 5 min of baking the crust 3. easy. and everyone will love it

media:content.media:title: French Silk Pie
media:content.media:description: this pie ticks off all of the boxes 1. you can make it ahead 2. only 5 min of baking the crust 3. easy. and everyone will love it

item.title: This Grinder Feels Like Sunday Dinner
item.description: All the cozy sandwich energy, with a little extra payoff in every bite.

media:content.media:title: This Grinder Feels Like Sunday Dinner
media:content.media:description: All the cozy sandwich energy, with a little extra payoff in every bite.

item.title: Mocha Morning Rolls
item.description: The espresso frosting makes the whole thing feel bakery-worthy without going overboard.

media:content.media:title: Mocha Morning Rolls
media:content.media:description: The espresso frosting makes the whole thing feel bakery-worthy without going overboard.

item.title: Authentic Tiramisu Recipe
item.description: This authentic Italian Tiramisu recipe consists of a sweet creamy mascarpone filling, layered with espresso-dipped lady fingers and topped with a thick dusting of cocoa powder.

media:content.media:title: Authentic Tiramisu Recipe
media:content.media:description: This authentic Italian Tiramisu recipe consists of a sweet creamy mascarpone filling, layered with espresso-dipped lady fingers and topped with a thick dusting of cocoa powder.

item.description: This pudding is the perfect dessert

item.title: Delicious Blueberry Pumpkin Muffins
item.description: Quick and easy recipe to make delicious blueberry muffins

item.title: The Turkey Club, But Make It Excessive
item.description: Three slices, all the nostalgia, and exactly the kind of lunch you’ll want to save.

media:content.media:title: The Turkey Club, But Make It Excessive
media:content.media:description: Three slices, all the nostalgia, and exactly the kind of lunch you’ll want to save.

item.title: Dubai Chocolate Tiramisu, Easy and Delicious
item.description: This Dubai Chocolate Tiramisu recipe is a riff on the viral dubai chocolate bar. Fluffy mascarpone filling is layered with ladyfingers, kataifi, pistachio cream (or pistachio butter), strawberries and dusted with cocoa powder. This is an easy, no-bake dessert everyone will love!

media:content.media:title: Dubai Chocolate Tiramisu, Easy and Delicious
media:content.media:description: This Dubai Chocolate Tiramisu recipe is a riff on the viral dubai chocolate bar. Fluffy mascarpone filling is layered with ladyfingers, kataifi, pistachio cream (or pistachio butter), strawberries and dusted with cocoa powder. This is an easy, no-bake dessert everyone will love!

item.title: The Only Cranberry Sauce Recipe You Need
item.description: This homemade cranberry sauce recipe is delicious, simple and perfect. Fresh cranberries are simmered on the stove with cinnamon, sugar, vanilla and orange zest and juice.

media:content.media:title: The Only Cranberry Sauce Recipe You Need
media:content.media:description: This homemade cranberry sauce recipe is delicious, simple and perfect. Fresh cranberries are simmered on the stove with cinnamon, sugar, vanilla and orange zest and juice.

item.title: Butterscotch Pumpkin Pie
item.description: This butterscotch pumpkin pie has delicious caramel notes, the perfect silky smooth texture and is the ideal pumpkin pie for your holiday table.

media:content.media:title: Butterscotch Pumpkin Pie
media:content.media:description: This butterscotch pumpkin pie has delicious caramel notes, the perfect silky smooth texture and is the ideal pumpkin pie for your holiday table.

item.title: The Fudgiest Peach Cobbler Surprise
item.description: A summer dessert with that soft, gooey middle everyone fights over.

media:content.media:title: The Fudgiest Peach Cobbler Surprise
media:content.media:description: A summer dessert with that soft, gooey middle everyone fights over.
